Package org.eventb.core.pog

Class ProofObligationGenerator

java.lang.Object
org.eventb.core.pog.ProofObligationGenerator
All Implemented Interfaces:
IAutomaticTool, IExtractor
Direct Known Subclasses:
ContextProofObligationGenerator, MachineProofObligationGenerator
public abstract class ProofObligationGenerator extends Object implements IAutomaticTool, IExtractor
Since:
1.0

    • clean

      public final void clean(org.eclipse.core.resources.IFile source, org.eclipse.core.resources.IFile file, org.eclipse.core.runtime.IProgressMonitor monitor) throws org.eclipse.core.runtime.CoreException
      Description copied from interface: IAutomaticTool
      A tool responsible for creating a file is also responsible for cleaning it. Cleaning occurs on two occasions:
      • when a project is explicitly selected for cleaning (e.g. in the Eclipse project menu)
      • when a file was deleted all files that can be reached by tool dependencies are cleaned
      Specified by:
      clean in interface IAutomaticTool
      Parameters:
      source - The source node from which the target node was created by an extractor, or null if this is unknown
      file - to be cleaned
      monitor - The progress monitor
      Throws:
      org.eclipse.core.runtime.CoreException - If some internal problem occurred

    • runModules

      private void runModules(IPOGProcessorModule rootModule, IRodinFile file, IPOGStateRepository repository, org.eclipse.core.runtime.IProgressMonitor monitor) throws org.eclipse.core.runtime.CoreException
      Throws:
      org.eclipse.core.runtime.CoreException

    • printModuleTree

      private void printModuleTree(String config, IRodinFile file, IModuleFactory moduleFactory)

      private IPOGProcessorModule getRootModule(IRodinFile rodinFile) throws org.eclipse.core.runtime.CoreException
      Throws:
      org.eclipse.core.runtime.CoreException

    • run

      public final boolean run(org.eclipse.core.resources.IFile source, org.eclipse.core.resources.IFile target, org.eclipse.core.runtime.IProgressMonitor monitor) throws org.eclipse.core.runtime.CoreException
      Description copied from interface: IAutomaticTool
      Runs the tool that updates a file (or a set of files). The tool must delete all markers from the input file(s) from which file is (directly) derived.
      Specified by:
      run in interface IAutomaticTool
      Parameters:
      source - The source node from which the target node was created by an extractor, or null if this is unknown
      target - The file to be updated
      monitor - The progress monitor
      Returns:
      True if file has changed, false otherwise
      Throws:
      org.eclipse.core.runtime.CoreException - If some internal problem occurred
